stemHtml: During IRS alignment while an aircraft is parked on Stand A (N37 37.6 W005 54.0) the aircraft needs to be towed to Stand B (N37 37.3 W005 54.0). Which of the following statements are correct?

options.b: The pilots can enter the co-ordinates from Stand A before moving the aircraft
options.c: Request to wait until after alignment is complete.
